_metadata.source: Lincoln Institute of Land Policy / Minnesota Center for Fiscal Excellence

MN.assessment_practice: County assessors; state Board of Assessors equalizes
MN.classification_detail: Different classes of property taxed at different rates
MN.circuit_breaker_detail: Property Tax Refund for qualifying homeowners and renters

WI.assessment_practice: Local assessors; state equalization by DOR
WI.homestead_exemptions: Lottery and Gaming Credit applied to primary residence

TX.assessment_practice: County appraisal districts; state Comptroller equalizes
TX.homestead_exemptions: Mandatory $100,000 homestead exemption (school districts), additional for 65+/disabled

NJ.assessment_practice: Local tax assessors; county boards of taxation equalize
NJ.homestead_exemptions: Homestead Benefit Program (rebate for qualifying homeowners)
NJ.circuit_breaker_detail: Senior Freeze program for 65+ and disabled homeowners

CA.assessment_practice: County assessors; Proposition 13 limits assessment increases to 2%/year from purchase price
CA.homestead_exemptions: Homeowners' Exemption ($7,000 reduction in assessed value)

IL.assessment_practice: Township assessors (Cook County) / County supervisors of assessments; state equalization factor
IL.classification_detail: Cook County uses classification — residential assessed at 10% of market value, commercial at 25%
IL.homestead_exemptions: General Homestead Exemption ($10,000 Cook County, $6,000 elsewhere)
IL.circuit_breaker_detail: Senior Citizens Property Tax Grant (circuit breaker for 65+ with income under $65,000)

NY.assessment_practice: Local assessors (varying cycle); state Office of Real Property Tax Services provides oversight
NY.classification_detail: NYC uses 4 property classes with different assessment ratios; rest of state varies
NY.homestead_exemptions: STAR program — Basic ($30,000 exemption) and Enhanced ($74,900 for 65+)
NY.circuit_breaker_detail: NYC rent increase exemption (SCRIE/DRIE) and state School Tax Relief (STAR)

FL.assessment_practice: County property appraisers; state Department of Revenue equalizes
FL.homestead_exemptions: Save Our Homes: $50,000 homestead exemption; 3%/year assessment cap for homestead

PA.assessment_practice: County-administered with widely varying practices. Some counties use outdated base years.
PA.circuit_breaker_detail: Property Tax/Rent Rebate Program for 65+, widows/widowers, and disabled

OH.assessment_practice: County auditors. Triennial reappraisals with sexennial physical inspections.
OH.classification_detail: Residential/agricultural assessed at 35% of market value; commercial at 35% but different rollback percentages
OH.homestead_exemptions: Homestead exemption for 65+ and disabled ($26,200 reduction in market value)

GA.assessment_practice: County tax assessors. Assessed at 40% of fair market value.
GA.homestead_exemptions: Basic homestead exemption varies by county ($2,000-$50,000+); additional for 62+

MA.assessment_practice: Local assessors at full and fair cash value. Triennial certification by DOR.
MA.classification_detail: Municipalities may adopt classification to tax commercial/industrial at higher rate than residential
MA.homestead_exemptions: Residential exemption (adopted locally); property tax deferral for 65+
MA.circuit_breaker_detail: Senior Circuit Breaker Tax Credit for 65+ homeowners/renters

CO.assessment_practice: 64 county assessors. Residential at 6.7% of actual value; commercial at 29%.
CO.classification_detail: Residential property assessed at 6.7% of actual value; non-residential at 29%
CO.homestead_exemptions: Senior Homestead Exemption (50% of first $200,000 for 65+, 10-year residency)
CO.circuit_breaker_detail: Property Tax/Rent/Heat Rebate for 65+ and disabled with income under $16,925

CT.assessment_practice: 169 municipalities assess at 70% of fair market value. No county government.
CT.homestead_exemptions: Local option property tax exemptions for veterans, elderly, disabled
CT.circuit_breaker_detail: Property Tax Credit for income-qualifying homeowners (up to $300)

VA.assessment_practice: Local commissioners of the revenue or assessors. Fair market value. Annual or biennial reassessment.
VA.homestead_exemptions: Real estate tax exemption for 65+ and disabled (locality-specific income/asset limits)
VA.circuit_breaker_detail: Local tax relief programs for elderly and disabled (mandated by state, implemented by localities)

MI.assessment_practice: Local assessors. Assessed at 50% of true cash value. Proposal A caps taxable value increases at lesser of inflation or 5%.
MI.classification_detail: Homestead vs non-homestead: non-homestead pays additional school operating millage (~18 mills)
MI.homestead_exemptions: Principal Residence Exemption (exempt from 18-mill school operating tax)
MI.circuit_breaker_detail: Homestead Property Tax Credit for homeowners and renters with household income under $63,000

NH.assessment_practice: Local selectmen/assessors. Full and true value. Among highest effective rates nationally.
NH.homestead_exemptions: Elderly exemption (locality-specific); veterans' tax credit ($750 minimum)
NH.circuit_breaker_detail: Low and Moderate Income Homeowners Property Tax Relief (state-funded)

WA.assessment_practice: County assessors. Assessed at 100% of true and fair value.
WA.homestead_exemptions: Senior/Disabled Exemption for 61+ with income under $58,423
WA.circuit_breaker_detail: Property Tax Deferral Program for qualifying seniors, disabled, and limited-income homeowners

NC.assessment_practice: County tax administrators. Assessed at true value in money. Octennial revaluation cycle.
NC.homestead_exemptions: Homestead exclusion for 65+/disabled ($35,600-$50,000 based on income)
NC.circuit_breaker_detail: Circuit breaker tax deferment for 65+ and disabled with income under $57,050

OR.assessment_practice: County assessors. Measure 5 caps rates at $5/$1,000 for education, $10/$1,000 for general government. Measure 50 froze assessed values at 1995-96 levels with 3%/year growth cap.
OR.homestead_exemptions: Disabled Veteran Exemption; senior/disabled deferral program
OR.circuit_breaker_detail: Senior/Disabled Property Tax Deferral; elderly rental assistance

SC.assessment_practice: County assessors. Owner-occupied residential at 4% of FMV; commercial at 6%; other residential at 6%.
SC.classification_detail: Owner-occupied residential assessed at 4% of FMV; commercial at 6%; agricultural at use-value
SC.homestead_exemptions: Homestead exemption for 65+/disabled (exempt from school operating taxes)
